skills.name: Adrenaline
skills.description: Temporarily reduces stamina depletion when health is at 40% or lower.

levels.description: Temporarily reduces stamina depletion when health is at 40% or lower.

skills.name: Fire Attack
skills.description: Increases fire element attack power. (Elemental attack power has a maximum limit.)

skills.name: Marathon Runner
skills.description: Slows down stamina depletion for actions which continuously drain stamina (such as dashing).

skills.name: Special Ammo Boost
skills.description: Increases the power of bowgun special ammo, Dragon Piercer, and Thousand Dragons.

levels.description: Increases the power of bowgun special ammo, Dragon Piercer, and Thousand Dragons by 10%.
Increases the power of bowgun special ammo, Dragon Piercer, and Thousand Dragons by 20%.

skills.name: Fire Resistance
skills.description: Increases fire resistance. Also improves defense at higher levels.

skills.name: Artillery
skills.description: Strengthens explosive attacks like gunlance shells, Wyvern's Fire, charge blade phial attacks, and sticky ammo.

levels.description: Increases power of each attack by 10% and reduces Wyvern's Fire cooldown by 15%.
Increases power of each attack by 20% and reduces Wyvern's Fire cooldown by 30%.
Increases power of each attack by 30% and reduces Wyvern's Fire cooldown by 50%.
Increases power of each attack by 40% and reduces Wyvern's Fire cooldown by 60%.
Increases power of each attack by 50% and reduces Wyvern's Fire cooldown by 70%.
